Good news, Fernando. The hospital in Bogota wants to build a partnership with Einstein.
That is excellent. What does the agreement look like?
If we sign next month, we will start the program in March.
Good. If the benefits are mutual, my team will commit fully.

Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. I have good news about the partnership. The hospital in Bogota wants to build an alliance with Einstein. If we sign the agreement next month, we will start the program in March. The benefits are mutual: they will share patients, and we will share our research. If both teams commit, I am sure the partnership will be strong. Trust is the most important thing. Let us reach a final agreement this week. Talk soon, and have a good day.

Hi Sarah, this is Fernando. Thank you for the news about Bogota. I think this alliance is a great opportunity. If the terms are fair, my team will accept the agreement. We want a long-term partnership, not just one year. If we sign next month, we will visit the hospital in March. I trust their team, and I am sure the benefits will be mutual. I will send you my comments tomorrow. Let us reach an agreement soon. Talk to you later.
If we sign the agreement, we will start in March.
If both teams commit, the alliance will be strong.
The benefits are mutual for both centers.
Let us reach an agreement this week.
